since_last: 45% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.07%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 45% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.38% · BTC -0.91% · Gold -0.31% · Nasdaq100 -0.28%. 45% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.07%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.07%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.97%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -6.66%
cards.body: Leaders: NVT +3.34%, BIDU +2.93%, OKTA +2.39%, WDAY +1.97%, NOW +1.93%. Laggards: SKHY -6.66%, TSM -4.62%, MU -4.40%, ARM -4.12%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.21% at $134.99
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.21% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
